chunks.en: Before I go out, I always put my wallet and phone in my bag.
chunks.ja: 出かける前に、私はいつも財布とスマホをかばんに入れます。

chunks.en: I always check the weather, and if it looks like rain, I bring my umbrella.
chunks.ja: 私はいつも天気を確認して、雨が降りそうなら傘を持っていきます。

chunks.en: One time I forgot my house key, and I couldn't get back inside.
chunks.ja: あるとき家の鍵を忘れて、家の中に戻れませんでした。

chunks.en: That was really stressful, so now I'm more careful about my things.
chunks.ja: それは本当に大変だったので、今はもっと持ち物に気をつけています。

chunks.en: Now I always check my bag at the door before I leave home.
chunks.ja: 今は家を出る前に、玄関でいつもかばんの中を確認します。

chunks.en: So a small habit like this really helps me not forget important things.
chunks.ja: だからこんな小さな習慣が、大事な物を忘れないのに本当に役立っています。

outline: Opening: what I always pack (wallet, phone)
Point 1: choosing items by the weather
Point 2: a time I forgot my key
Wrap-up: my checking habit at the door

modelTalk.text: Before I go out, I always put a few things in my bag. My wallet and phone come first, every time. I put my keys and my train pass in too. Then I look at the weather on my phone. If it looks like rain, I bring a small umbrella. When it's cold, I add a light jacket. One morning I forgot my keys at home. I came back late, and I couldn't open my door. I felt so silly, and I waited outside for my mum. Another time I forgot my train pass, so I paid extra money. Now I try to be more careful. At the door, I stop and check my bag. I say "phone, wallet, keys" out loud, like a little song. It's a simple habit, but it really helps me a lot.

chunks.en: Before I go out, I always put my wallet, phone, and IC card in my bag.
chunks.ja: 出かける前に、私はいつも財布とスマホとICカードをかばんに入れます。

chunks.en: I check the weather first, so I can decide whether to bring an umbrella or a jacket.
chunks.ja: まず天気を確認して、傘や上着を持っていくかどうか決めます。

chunks.en: One time, I forgot my house key, and I couldn't get back inside for hours.
chunks.ja: あるとき家の鍵を忘れてしまい、何時間も家に入れませんでした。

chunks.en: Now I try not to forget things by checking my bag at the front door.
chunks.ja: 今は玄関でかばんの中を確認して、物を忘れないようにしています。

chunks.en: That's my simple routine, and it helps me start my day without stress.
chunks.ja: これが私の簡単な習慣で、ストレスなく一日を始めるのに役立っています。

outline: Point 2: a time I forgot my key

modelTalk.text: Before I go out, I always put a few things in my bag. My wallet, my phone, and my keys come first. I add my earphones and a small water bottle too. Then I check the weather on my phone. If it looks like rain, I pack a small umbrella. If it's cold, I bring a light jacket. One morning I was in a hurry, and I forgot my train pass. I couldn't get through the gate, so I felt really silly. Another time I left my house keys inside. I had to wait outside for a while. Now I have a simple habit. Before I open the front door, I stop and check my bag. I say the words "phone, wallet, keys" out loud. It's a small thing, but it really helps me a lot.
